title: 2 PCS 3 Digit Combination Lock, Outdoor Waterproof Padlock Cable Luggage Locks Mini Combination Padlock for School Gym, Locker, Travel Backpack, Suitcase, Storage (Pink, Blue)
features: 【Dual-Pack Value】Includes 2pcs of blue and pink cable combination locks, offering a stylish and practical solution for securing multiple items. great for gifts, school, gym, or travel essentials.

【3 Digit Combination Lock】Aysatogc small combination lock features a 3-digit resettable code, providing secure and personalized protection for your belongings. perfect as a mini backpack lock or small combo lock for everyday use.

【Versatile & Secure】These backpack locks are designed with a durable zinc alloy body and flexible steel cable, making them ideal as luggage cable locks, tent locks, or locks for lockers. The cable combination lock ensures no damage to your items.

【Compact & Portable】With dimensions of 3.8*9cm and a lightweight design (66g), this padlock with code is easy to carry. Use it as a gym locker lock or for securing backpacks, suitcases, and more during travel or outdoor activities.

【Easy to Use】Set your own 3-digit combination for quick access. The small combo lock is user-friendly, making it perfect for kids, teens, and adults. No keys needed—just remember your code for hassle-Free security.
description: Features： 1. Designed for on-the-go convenience,This mini locker lock fits in your pocket and requires only one hand to operate. 2. The original password of the combination lock is 000; You can change the password according to your preferences or needs, without the need to use the key or worry about losing it, which is convenient and safe. Specification： Product name: 2pcs blue + pink 3 digit combination lock Color: blue + pink Material: zinc alloy Size: 3.8*9cm/ Net weight: 66g Gross weight: 66g Packing method: bagged Packing size: 15*10*1.3cm Packing list: 2pcs blue + pink 3 digit combination lock
